title: Chat
drop_here_no_project: Drop here to remove from project
welcome_subtitle: Start a conversation, upload a file, or try one of these suggestions.
suggestion_1: Explain quantum computing in simple terms
suggestion_2: Write a Python function to merge two sorted lists
suggestion_3: Summarize the key points of a research paper
suggestion_4: Help me brainstorm ideas for a startup

system_prompt_hint: System prompt is prepended to every message in this project. Use it to define the project context, persona, or constraints.

error_no_response: No response received from the model.
error_last_message_no_response: The last message did not receive a response. You can retry.
